productDisplayName: Nike Fragrances Women Original Perfume 75 ml
description: For the free-spirited woman, this nike fragrances Original fragrance is inspired by the essence of the nike fragrances brand. This eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable green flask, is best for formal outings and beach wear. Caution: Flammable, Keep away from sources of ignition, Keep away from children. Do not use near fire, flame or heat, Avoid spraying near the eyes
